seo.title: SEO Hub
seo.subtitle: Cross-cutting SEO control plane for tenant defaults, redirects, robots, and sitemaps. Entity SEO authoring now lives in owner-module editors.

bulk.title: Bulk Editor
bulk.subtitle: Central SEO operator surface for one target kind and one locale per run. Owner-module SEO editors stay responsible for per-entity authoring.

redirects.title: Redirects
redirects.subtitle: Manual redirect rules stay tenant-scoped and run before canonical resolution. Content-specific metadata now belongs to owner-module editors.

sitemaps.title: Sitemaps
sitemaps.subtitle: Latest sitemap job status, file inventory, and manual regeneration live in one operator-focused panel. Entity SEO authoring is intentionally out of scope here.

robots.title: Robots
robots.subtitle: This pane previews the tenant-level robots.txt response and linked public URLs. Entity-level meta robots remain part of owner-module SEO panels.

defaults.title: Defaults
defaults.subtitle: Tenant-scoped SEO defaults are persisted through the shared module settings contract. This pane does not own page, product, blog, or forum metadata editing.

diagnostics.title: Diagnostics
diagnostics.subtitle: Infrastructure-only summary of current SEO runtime inputs. Per-entity scores and analysis stay in owner-module editors.
